title: Domicile of office; venue
doc_html:
§149.1. Domicile of office; venue

            A. The office shall be domiciled in East Baton Rouge Parish.

            B. Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the venue for any civil proceeding by or against the office or to which the office is a party shall be East Baton Rouge Parish.

            Acts 1999, No. 1012, §1; Acts 2007, No. 307, §1; Acts 2024, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 22, §1, eff. March 20, 2024.
